description: Live GitHub + WakaTime activity over the last 7 days.

data.summary: This week, Ethan Qiu logged 23 hrs 48 mins of coding time, with a daily average of 3 hrs 13 mins. His WakaTime activity spanned 6 projects and was mostly in Java, with additional time in Other, Markdown, and TypeScript. GitHub activity in the provided data shows no commits, pull requests, or new repositories.
